skill.name: skywork-music-maker
skill.description: Create professional music with Mureka AI API — songs, instrumentals, and lyrics from natural language descriptions in any language.
skill.summary: Generate professional-quality music using Mureka AI API with structured prompt conversion and quality validation.
skill.author: SkyworkAI

security_audit.summary: Legitimate music generation API client. Static analyzer detected 278 pattern matches, but 274 are false positives from Markdown documentation (backticks showing example commands, not shell execution). Four actual risk factors identified: network requests to api.mureka.ai (expected API usage), filesystem writes for audio output, environment variable access for API key, and external commands in documentation only. No malicious intent detected. Standard API client security profile.

low_findings.title: External API Dependency
low_findings.description: Skill depends on external Mureka AI API (api.mureka.ai) for core functionality. API key required and network requests made for all music generation operations.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Hardcoded API_BASE constant points to external service - this is expected and documented behavior for an API client.

low_findings.title: API Key in Environment Variable
low_findings.description: Skill requires MUREKA_API_KEY environment variable. Key is read from environment and sent in Authorization header for API requests.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Standard API key management pattern - reading from environment variable is a security best practice.

low_findings.title: File Output to Disk
low_findings.description: Generated audio files are written to user-specified output directories. Script creates directories and writes binary audio content.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Expected behavior for a music generation tool - files written only to user-controlled output paths.

content.value_statement: Creating music requires technical expertise and expensive equipment. This skill enables anyone to generate professional songs, instrumentals, and lyrics using natural language descriptions through the Mureka AI API.
actual_capabilities: Generate complete songs with vocals and lyrics from text prompts
Create instrumental tracks for videos, games, and background music
Write and extend lyrics with proper song structure (verse, chorus, bridge)
Clone vocals from 15-30 second audio samples
Use reference tracks to guide music style (30 second samples)
Convert natural language descriptions to structured music prompts
limitations: Requires valid Mureka API key and account balance
Cannot generate music offline - depends on external API
File uploads have duration limits (15-60 seconds depending on purpose)
Song generation is asynchronous with 10 minute timeout

use_cases.title: Content Creator Background Music
use_cases.description: Generate custom background music for YouTube videos, podcasts, and streams without copyright concerns.

use_cases.title: Songwriter Idea Generation
use_cases.description: Rapidly prototype song ideas with different styles, lyrics, and arrangements before full production.

use_cases.title: Multilingual Music Creation
use_cases.description: Create songs in any language with culturally appropriate prompts and lyrics structure.

prompt_templates.title: Simple Background Music
prompt_templates.prompt: Create calm background music for a tech product video - ambient electronic, 80 BPM, soft pads, no percussion, 2 minutes long
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner: User needs simple instrumental background music

prompt_templates.title: Pop Song with Lyrics
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate an upbeat summer pop song: synth-pop genre, 120 BPM, bright arpeggiated synths, punchy electronic drums, female vocal with light reverb. Lyrics theme: nostalgic summer memories, structure with [Verse], [Chorus], [Bridge] tags
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate: User wants a complete song with specific style

prompt_templates.title: Traditional Cultural Music
prompt_templates.prompt: Create Chinese traditional guofeng music: 60 BPM, dizi bamboo flute lead, guzheng plucked strings, subtle erhu, misty atmosphere, Jiangnan water town imagery. Lyrics in Chinese with proper structure tags, melancholic and nostalgic mood
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced: User wants culturally specific music with authentic instruments

prompt_templates.title: Vocal Cloning with Reference
prompt_templates.prompt: Upload vocal sample (20 seconds, mp3) for voice cloning, then generate R&B song: smooth 90 BPM, warm analog synths, driving bass line, use cloned vocal for emotional delivery. Lyrics: love ballad with [Verse], [Chorus], [Bridge], [Outro] structure
prompt_templates.scenario: Expert: User wants to use custom voice with style transfer

output_examples.input: Create a chill lo-fi beat for studying
output: Structured prompt: lo-fi hip-hop, warm and mellow, 75 BPM, dusty vinyl crackle, jazzy Rhodes chords, muted boom-bap drums, no vocals, late-night study session atmosphere
Validation: BPM set, 4 instruments named, mood consistent, instrumental confirmed

output_examples.input: Write lyrics for a breakup song then generate it
output: Generated lyrics with structure: [Verse 1] Empty chair across the table / Coffee cold, the morning grey... [Chorus] I still reach for you at night / But only find the empty side...
Song prompt: indie folk, melancholic, 85 BPM, acoustic guitar fingerpicking, soft strings, male husky vocal, intimate bedroom recording aesthetic
Output: audio_0.mp3, audio_1.mp3 (two variations), lyrics.txt with full song structure

best_practices: Always validate prompts against the quality checklist before generation - specific genre, BPM, 3-5 instruments, mood descriptors, and vocal style prevent 80% of generation failures
Generate multiple variations (n=2 or n=3) and compare results - never rely on a single generation output
Keep lyric lines under 10 words with consistent syllable counts - short lines produce clearer vocal delivery and better rhythm
anti_patterns: Using vague prompts like 'nice song' or 'good music' - the AI defaults to generic average output without specific descriptors
Combining contradictory elements like 'slow and energetic' or 'sad and uplifting' - conflicting signals produce unpredictable results
Changing the entire prompt between iterations - modify only one element at a time to isolate what improves or worsens the output

faq.question: How do I get a Mureka API key?
faq.answer: Register at https://platform.mureka.ai, navigate to API Keys in your account dashboard, and generate a new key. Set it as the MUREKA_API_KEY environment variable before using any commands.

faq.question: What audio formats are supported for output?
faq.answer: The skill supports MP3 (default), FLAC, and WAV formats. Specify with the --format flag when generating music.

faq.question: How long does music generation take?
faq.answer: Generation is asynchronous and typically completes within 2-5 minutes. The script polls every 5 seconds with a 10 minute timeout. Complex prompts or server load may increase wait times.

faq.question: Can I use my own voice for generated songs?
faq.answer: Yes, upload a 15-30 second vocal sample using 'mureka.py upload voice.mp3 --purpose vocal', then reference it with --vocal-id when generating songs.

faq.question: What if my generated task fails or times out?
faq.answer: Check that your prompt meets the quality checklist (specific genre, BPM, instruments, mood). Verify lyrics have structure tags. Retry with a simplified prompt if issues persist.

faq.question: Can I generate music in languages other than English?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill accepts natural language input in any language. The AI converts it to structured English prompts while preserving cultural and musical meaning.
